lineup_source: Algeria vs Jordan, World Cup 2026 group stage, June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Luca Zidane
players.note: Born in Aix-en-Provence to Zinedine Zidane (Algerian Kabyle heritage, parents emigrated to France) and Spanish-descent mother Véronique Fernández; switched sporting nationality from France to Algeria in 2025.

players.name: Rafik Belghali
players.note: Born in Leuven, Belgium, to Algerian immigrant parents; father from Chlef, mother from Aïn Sefra.

players.name: Aissa Mandi
players.note: Born in Châlons-en-Champagne, France, to Algerian immigrant parents from Chlef.

players.name: Ramy Bensebaini
players.note: Born and raised in Constantine, Algeria; individual parent origins not documented but presumed Algerian (homegrown).

players.name: Rayan Ait-Nouri
players.note: Born in Montreuil, France; both parents emigrated from Algeria in their early 20s, met in France (father worked at Orly Airport, mother as a cleaner).

players.name: Hicham Boudaoui
players.note: Born and raised in Béchar, Algeria, in a large working-class family; individual parent origins not documented.

players.name: Ramiz Zerrouki
players.note: Born in Amsterdam to Algerian immigrant parents; father from Sidi Bel Abbès, family settled in the Netherlands before his birth.

players.name: Ibrahim Maza
players.note: Born in Berlin; father Sofiane immigrated to Germany from Algiers, and Maza is also of Vietnamese descent through his mother.

players.name: Riyad Mahrez
players.note: Born in Clichy, France; father Ahmed from Beni Snous, Tlemcen Province, Algeria; mother Halima also from the Tlemcen region, of Algerian-Moroccan descent.

players.name: Mohamed Amoura
players.note: Born and raised in Jijel, Algeria, son of a farmer; also holds French nationality but parents are Algerian (homegrown).

players.name: Fares Chaibi
players.note: Born in Bron, near Lyon, France, to Algerian parents (individual origins not further specified).
